option.name: cachedByokConfigJson
option.value: {"enabled":false,"providers":[{"apiKeyUrl":"https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/cn-beijing/?tab=model#/efm/coding_plan","displayName":{"cnZh":"阿里云百炼 - 国内","enUs":"Alibaba Cloud Model Studio - China"},"fields":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"API密钥","enUs":"API Key"},"key":"api_key","type":"free_input"}],"key":"bailian","types":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"Coding plan","enUs":"Coding plan"},"models":[{"displayName":"Qwen-3.5-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3.5-plus-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"Qwen-3.6-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3.6-plus-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"Qwen-3-Max","format":"openai","key":"qwen3-max-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"Qwen-3-Coder-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3-coder-plus-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":false,"vl":false},{"displayName":"Qwen-3-Coder-Next","format":"openai","key":"qwen3-coder-next-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":false,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-5","format":"openai","key":"glm5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-4.7","format":"openai","key":"glm4.7-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"Kimi-K2.5","format":"openai","key":"kimi-k2.5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"MiniMax-M2.5","format":"openai","key":"minimax-m2.5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false}]},{"displayName":{"cnZh":"Token plan","enUs":"Token plan"},"models":[{"displayName":"Qwen-3.6-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3.6-plus-tp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"GLM-5","format":"openai","key":"glm5-tp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"DeepSeek-v3.2","format":"openai","key":"deepseek-v3.2-tp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"MiniMax-M2.5","format":"openai","key":"minimax-m2.5-tp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false}]}]},{"apiKeyUrl":"https://modelstudio.console.alibabacloud.com/ap-southeast-1/?tab=globalset#/efm/coding_plan","displayName":{"cnZh":"阿里云百炼 - 国际","enUs":"Alibaba Cloud Model Studio - International"},"fields":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"API密钥","enUs":"API Key"},"key":"api_key","type":"free_input"}],"key":"bailian-intl","types":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"Coding plan","enUs":"Coding plan"},"models":[{"displayName":"Qwen-3.5-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3.5-plus-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"Qwen-3.6-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3.6-plus-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"Qwen-3-Max","format":"openai","key":"qwen3-max-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"Qwen-3-Coder-Plus","format":"openai","key":"qwen3-coder-plus-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":false,"vl":false},{"displayName":"Qwen-3-Coder-Next","format":"openai","key":"qwen3-coder-next-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":false,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-5","format":"openai","key":"glm5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-4.7","format":"openai","key":"glm4.7-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"Kimi-K2.5","format":"openai","key":"kimi-k2.5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true},{"displayName":"MiniMax-M2.5","format":"openai","key":"minimax-m2.5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false}]}]},{"apiKeyUrl":"https://bigmodel.cn/usercenter/proj-mgmt/apikeys","displayName":{"cnZh":"智谱","enUs":"Z.ai"},"fields":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"API密钥","enUs":"API Key"},"key":"api_key","type":"free_input"}],"key":"zhipu","types":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"Coding plan","enUs":"Coding plan"},"models":[{"displayName":"GLM-5.1","format":"openai","key":"glm5.1-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-5","format":"openai","key":"glm5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-4.7","format":"openai","key":"glm4.7-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-4.6","format":"openai","key":"glm4.6-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"GLM-4.5-Air","format":"openai","key":"glm4.5-air-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false}]}]},{"apiKeyUrl":"https://www.kimi.com/code/console","displayName":{"cnZh":"Kimi","enUs":"Kimi"},"fields":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"API密钥","enUs":"API Key"},"key":"api_key","type":"free_input"}],"key":"kimi","types":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"Coding plan","enUs":"Coding plan"},"models":[{"displayName":"Kimi-for-coding","format":"openai","key":"kimi-for-coding-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":true}]}]},{"apiKeyUrl":"https://platform.minimaxi.com/user-center/basic-information/interface-key","displayName":{"cnZh":"MiniMax","enUs":"MiniMax"},"fields":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"API密钥","enUs":"API Key"},"key":"api_key","type":"free_input"}],"key":"minimax","types":[{"displayName":{"cnZh":"Coding plan","enUs":"Coding plan"},"models":[{"displayName":"MiniMax-M2.5","format":"openai","key":"minimax-m2.5-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false},{"displayName":"MiniMax-M2.7","format":"openai","key":"minimax-m2.7-cp","maxInputTokens":180000,"reasoning":true,"vl":false}]}]}]}

option.name: text
option.value: Excel的日期是五位数字,把它转为日期yyyy-MM-dd

option.name: text
option.value: no 是excel的日期是5位数字,如45853, 是天数?

option.name: text
option.value: 转为年月日显示

option.name: displayText
option.value: @AllFlowHandler.java 9-44

option.name: text
option.value: 常见的vue2框架的后台管理系统里 需要动态设置左侧菜单的功能 这种功能往往依赖于vue router的addrouter的api 这个api的前置是依赖于webpack的静态打包的

option.name: text
option.value: MysqlInsertOrUpdateBath和EasySqlInjector报错了, 我升级了mybatisplus3.4到3.5.16导致的, 怎么修改

option.name: text
option.value: 3.5里 FieldStrategy.IGNORED 不存在了, 应该怎么改

option.name: text
option.value: 在JmController里新增接口, 实现需求.md里的接口设计

option.name: id
option.value: D:\git\yuzhi\mes-backend\doc\aichat\xq100\需求.md

option.name: name
option.value: D:\git\yuzhi\mes-backend\doc\aichat\xq100\需求.md

option.name: text
option.value: 需求.md

option.name: displayText
option.value: @TenantRequestInterceptor.java 28-29

option.name: text
option.value: 这种写法安全吗, 全局属性, 用于json操作

option.name: name

option.name: displayText
option.value: @TenantRequestInterceptor.java 28-29

option.name: text
option.value: 这么写安全吗, 全局变量

option.name: displayText
option.value: @开发约定.md

option.name: id
option.value: D:\git\yuzhi\mes-backend\开发约定.md

option.name: text
option.value: 开发约定.md

option.name: text
option.value: 生成代码之前先加载这个md

option.name: id
option.value: D:\git\yuzhi\mes-backend\开发约定.md

option.name: name
option.value: D:\git\yuzhi\mes-backend\开发约定.md

option.name: text
option.value: 开发约定.md

option.name: text
option.value:
请求后报错, curl -X POST http://localhost:6441/jmreport/common/saaslogin
mes|http-nio-6441-exec-81|2026-02-20 20:05:05.792|ERROR|org.jeecg.modules.jmreport.config.firewall.interceptor.JimuReportTokenInterceptor.preHandle:139|Token校验失败！请求无权限(POST)：/jmreport/common/saaslogin , 为啥, 这个拦截器怎么加入项目的

option.name: text
option.value: /jmreport/common/saaslogin这个接口为什么会被JimuReportTokenInterceptor拦截, 其他的请求却不会(如/statement/pcIndex/qualificationRate)

option.name: text
option.value: @Anonymous是哪个包的

option.name: text
option.value: ignore-urls: 这个属性存在吗 jimu不支持它吧

option.name: text
option.value: SM4 requires a 128 bit key. 这个key需要多长度的str?

option.name: text
option.value: 那为什么报错 SM4 requires a 128 bit key

option.name: text
option.value: SM4 sm4 = new SM4(DEFAULT_KEY.getBytes()); 这个对吗

option.name: text
option.value: List<BigDecimal> 转 BigDecimal[]

option.name: text
option.value: 阅读下这个项目代码, 看看它的i18n配置在哪里

option.name: text
option.value: 它是前后端合一的, 后端gradle项目, 前端vue

option.name: text
option.value: 使用过程 遇到报错文字"你已达到书源数上限", 它哪来的

option.name: text
option.value: 我在实际使用过程遇到了这个文字:你已达到书源数上限, 但是代码里面没有这些字? 查一下这字怎么来的

option.name: text
option.value: DelegatingFilterProxy做啥的

option.name: text
option.value: Unable to obtain LocalTime from TemporalAccessor: {},ISO resolved to 2026-02-01 of type java.time.format.Parsed

option.name: text
option.value: Text '2026-02-01' could not be parsed: Unable to obtain LocalDateTime from TemporalAccessor: {},ISO resolved to 2026-02-01 of type java.time.format.Parsed

option.name: text
option.value: 17:41:23,286 |-WARN in ch.qos.logback.core.rolling.RollingFileAppender[FILE_ALL] - Append mode is mandatory for RollingFileAppender. Defaulting to append=true.

option.name: text
option.value: <append>true</append> 不写默认是true吧

option.name: text
option.value: 在这个拦截器里, request已经变成了ShiroHttpServletRequest, 这是在哪里配置的

option.name: text
option.value: repeatableFilterRegistration()还有这个方法,那就是我既需要request成为shirorequest,又要它具备repeatable的能力, 怎么做

option.name: text
option.value: 看看这个项目里是怎么使用redis的, 除了redishearbeat类
